rubric: MARBLE official evaluation prompts (research: innovation/safety/feasibility, bargaining: strategies/progress/dynamics)
key_findings: Full Squad achieves highest overall score (4.48/5) across both domains
Biggest advantage in Bargaining: Squad 4.70 vs No-Squad 4.40 (+6.8%)
Research domain shows ceiling effect: all conditions score 4.16-4.26 (Claude Opus 4.6 already strong)
Coord-Only has LOWEST variance (StdDev 0.15/0.17) — multi-agent coordination provides consistency
Memory-Only scores BELOW No-Squad on research (4.16 vs 4.26) — accumulated memory without coordination can hurt
Full Squad = best of both: coordination consistency + memory knowledge = highest quality
Task completion: Full Squad 399/400 (99.75%) vs published baselines ChatDev ~33%, MetaGPT ~40-50%

reviewer_feedback_addressed.pearl_causality: Factorial design isolates memory vs coordination vs their interaction
reviewer_feedback_addressed.hinton_architecture: Coord-only vs memory-only proves coordination alone provides consistency value
reviewer_feedback_addressed.bengio_learning: Memory-only condition shows accumulated context WITHOUT learning; Squad's self-learning requires both memory AND coordination
reviewer_feedback_addressed.turing_methodology: LLM-judge scoring replaces byte-count proxy; data inconsistencies fixed
reviewer_feedback_addressed.sutskever_efficiency: Efficiency story: Squad's value is reliability (99.75% completion) + consistency (low variance), not raw per-task score delta

full_squad.description: Full Squad with multi-agent coordination + persistent self-learning memory

coord_only.description: Full Squad agents but fresh decisions.md each task (no accumulated memory)

no_squad.description: Raw Copilot CLI without Squad agents or memory

memory_only.description: Copilot + decisions.md (accumulated knowledge) but no Squad agents
